description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden barrel resting on a sturdy wooden stand, featuring a cylindrical body reinforced by two prominent metal hoops. The wood is dark and weathered, suggesting age and exposure to the elements, with visible grain and texture throughout the surface. On one circular end, there is a decorative fleur-de-lis marking and a small metal spigot, indicating the barrel is designed to dispense liquid. The opposite end is plain, lacking any markings or openings. The stand elevates the barrel slightly off the ground, providing stability and ease of access to the spigot. The overall construction and finish evoke a rustic, historical feel, suitable for urban or park settings.
description: A dark, weathered wooden barrel with metal hoops, mounted on a wooden stand and featuring a spigot and decorative marking on one end.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular end with a fleur-de-lis marking and a metal spigot at the bottom center.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the barrel's cylindrical body, two metal hoops, and the supporting wooden stand.
description_view_2: Rear view of the plain circular end of the barrel, with no markings or openings visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the barrel's body, hoops, and stand from the other side.
